note: Merchant-created orders do not trigger immediate payment. Instead a QR code is returned. Payment is initiated when the customer scans the QR code via their app, at which point the qrpay module transitions the order to PAYMENT_INITIATED.

endpoints.description: Creates an order from the authenticated branch's products and returns a QR code for the customer to scan and pay. No payment provider is called at this stage.

orderId.description: Canonical business reference embedded in the QR code.

status.description: Always CREATED on merchant order creation; transitions to PAYMENT_INITIATED when customer scans.

paymentRetryAllowed.description: true — customer has not yet scanned.

qrCode.description: QR code for the customer to scan and pay.

imageBase64.description: Base64-encoded PNG of the QR code.

paymentUrl.description: Deep-link URL encoded in the QR code, pointing to the QR pay flow with the orderId embedded.

400.description: The order request is malformed, empty, or contains invalid quantities.

404.description: One or more referenced products are unknown.

422.description: Validation failed. Response body lists every invalid product reference and the specific rejection reason.
